response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience (~16 years) but lacks the core requirements for this role. C++ experience is minimal and dated (only briefly at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a bachelor thesis), with no Windows-platform C++ work, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain background. Primary stack is JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — none of which align with the mandatory skills.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience across multiple domains
Strong communication skills evidenced by talks, workshops, and teaching
Solid testing/TDD discipline and software craftsmanship mindset
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months in 2014-2015) and not on Windows
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience; SQL listed only generically

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain background
